summary: EXP-234 resolves ISS-1455 (P7 asymmetric test setup) by committing in text to a specific pre-registered mag-lat prediction method per station — CGM magnetic latitude from IAGA registry + Kim & Chang (2018) 30°–50° response envelope as a binary classifier (inside-band → ensemble median; outside → suppressed), with a smooth-fit upgrade path if 39-eclipse binned amplitudes become accessible. This produces nine specific standard-model predictions to match the dome's nine FSF numbers, closing the "any 2026 outcome is consistent with Kim & Chang" loophole.
